page_content:
Restriction: Must be enrolled in PreK-12 Physical Education Master of Education program.

Credit Only Granted for: KNES6891 OR KNES622.

Formerly: KNES689I.

KNES628 PCS Research & Writing Workshop (3 Credits)

This directed and project focused writing workshop provides students in Physical Cultural Studies, and related fields, the opportunity to develop a processual understanding of the writing craft, focused on enhancing academic writing and editing skills, practices, and routines.
